scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci --production=false && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npm ci && npm start
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.verify:backend: npm --prefix backend run check:env && npm --prefix backend run test:ci
scripts.verify:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:frontend
